action_set_definitions.name: get_grid_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time operational metrics of the power grid, including frequency, demand, total active generation, battery State of Charge (SoC) in MWh, and stability status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_generator_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a comprehensive registry of all active generation and storage units, detailing their unique IDs, current power output, maximum operational capacity, and ramp rate limits (MW per dispatch step).

action_set_definitions.name: update_dispatch
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power output level of a specific unit. Changes must respect the unit's ramp rate and maximum capacity.

unit_id.description: The identifier of the unit to be adjusted.

target_output_mw.description: The new power output level requested in Megawatts.

state_description.grid_frequency_hz: The current operational frequency of the power grid. Nominal value is usually 50.0 or 60.0.
state_description.total_demand_mw: The total instantaneous power demand from all consumers on the grid in Megawatts.
state_description.active_generation_mw: The total real-time power being injected into the grid by all active generators.
state_description.storage_soc_mwh: State of Charge: The current energy stored in the grid's battery systems in Megawatt-hours.
state_description.generator_registry: A detailed mapping of individual generators, their current output, and their operational limits.
state_description.grid_stability_status: The current status of the grid (e.g., 'Stable', 'Under-frequency Alert', 'Critical Load Shedding').
